summary: Executed backend pytest regression plus mobile-first UI integration on public preview for GIF export and website-builder embed code flows; requested scenarios are passing.
action_items: No blocking defects found for this request; optional final sanity pass by main agent before merge.
critical_code_review_comments: backend /api/site-html is async but still uses requests.get in a thread; functionally okay, but async HTTP client would reduce complexity under load.
Most controls inside injected renderer HTML use id selectors and lack data-testid hooks, reducing long-term UI test robustness.
No MOCKED API observed in this run.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/renders test creates TEST_pytest render record during persistence validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://hex-palette-render.preview.emergentagent.com (mobile 375x667). Verified /api/export-gif returns image/gif with GIF header and meaningful size; /api/health, /api/site-html, /api/tonality-renderer still healthy. UI verified export panel visibility, embed code generation with exact palette CSS + overlays, copy status feedback, GIF blob download link generation, and hue change updating generated palette values.
rca_of_issue: No functional regression reproduced in requested scope. Clipboard copy is browser-permission dependent in automation context; app correctly falls back with explicit manual-copy status.
